underlying_goal: Test and fix an artifact creation guard feature across a workflow, ensuring schema_data hierarchy rules are properly enforced and documented
friction_detail: Claude misinterpreted a restart instruction as a checklist item, dismissed a real error as pre-existing, and proposed an incorrect fix that violated schema_data hierarchy rules.
brief_summary: User wanted to test a workflow feature and fix resulting errors; Claude struggled with misinterpretations and a wrong fix but eventually corrected the issues and added extensive documentation about schema_data rules.
